scope: Sprint 4 hardened sandbox and deterministic failure reproduction
Sprint 5 enterprise Codex investigation orchestration and evidence-grounded diagnosis
Sprint 6 controlled recovery, patch governance and pull-request packaging

validation.workspaceStructure: passed across 14 npm workspaces and 18 required enterprise paths

recoveryEvaluation.coverage: minimal source patch, traversal, binary patch, dependencies, lockfiles, workflows, migrations, security-sensitive files, generated output, budgets and missing provenance

validation.recoveryMigrationStaticValidation: passed for 16 Prisma models, 16 migration tables, 14 immutable triggers and forced-RLS setup
validation.scriptSyntax: passed for recovery migration, reconciliation and persistence smoke scripts
validation.yamlParsing: passed for all GitHub Actions workflows

dependencyAudit.policy: release gate fails on high or critical severity; moderate upstream transitive findings remain tracked

validation.prismaSchemaValidation: not executed locally because binaries.prisma.sh DNS resolution failed while Prisma attempted to download its schema engine
validation.databaseIntegration: Sprint 6 migration, RLS, lease fencing, immutable patch, separation-of-duties and multi-approver smoke coverage implemented; execution requires PostgreSQL
validation.dockerVerification: controlled recovery invokes the hardened sandbox verification boundary; real Docker execution remains an environment gate
validation.liveProviderEvaluation: not executed; requires a secret-managed OpenAI API key and sanitized private fixtures
validation.patchBoundary: canonical unified diffs, full-SHA worktrees, atomic application, path confinement, change budgets and hunk-level provenance are implemented
validation.humanGovernance: service/system/agent publication decisions are rejected; distinct human approvers and separation of duties are enforced per immutable patch version
validation.tenantIsolation: recovery persistence uses tenant-scoped application queries and forced PostgreSQL RLS
validation.durability: transactional outbox, leases, heartbeats, checkpoints, cancellation, revisions, reconciliation and append-only cleanup proof are implemented
validation.publicationScope: Sprint 6 generates an approved pull-request package but does not push, create, merge or deploy automatically

enterpriseGate: closed pending PostgreSQL migration/RLS execution, real Docker verification, private live-model evaluation, production OIDC/SCIM, managed GitHub publication credentials, KMS-backed signing and secrets, SIEM integration, load/chaos/red-team testing and formal operational readiness review
